<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band04_chunk006.pdf#page=6 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band04 p260 -->

UNTERSCHWEINBACH


[[File:Band04_chunk006_p006_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk006_p006_img002.jpg|thumb|Mariä Himmelfahrt]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band04 p261 -->
